description: The New york Man Pure fragrance by police for men is as the name indicates, cosmopolitan, very urban and masculine and is classed as an oriental fougere. Its top notes are bergamot, mandarin, cold spices and heart notes cyclamen, jasmine, ylang ylang and rosewood. The base notes are made of cedar wood, amber, musk and balsamic. Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
